cfo_logistics.title: Logistics & Shipments
cfo_logistics.emptyState: No active shipments tracked. Add shipments via the Track17 integration to see logistics impact on working capital.
cfo_logistics.askPrompt: My shipments: {inTransitCount} in transit worth {inTransitValue}, {delayedCount} delayed ({delayedValue} at risk), financing cost {financingCost}, avg delivery {avgDays} days. How can I reduce logistics costs and working capital tied up in transit?
cfo_logistics.atRiskWarning: {n} shipment flagged as at-risk — may cause stockout or revenue loss if delayed further.
cfo_logistics.inTransitSummary: {value} in inventory is currently in transit. This capital is tied up for an average of {days} days until goods arrive and can be sold.
